revops_salesops.title: RevOps / Sales Ops
revops_salesops.summary: Revenue operations leader focused on pipeline visibility, CRM workflow design, forecasting discipline, and AI-assisted prospecting systems.
selected_wins: Built more than $6M in outbound pipeline through targeted prospecting and outbound systems design.
Generated 3,700+ new accounts through territory planning, targeted outreach, and commercial execution.
Acquired 1,000+ new customers across industrial, healthcare, and B2B markets.
Exceeded retention targets above 93 percent while expanding account relationships.
resume_angle: Frame yourself as the operator who installs visibility, targeting logic, funnel discipline, and workflow clarity.
Use wins tied to pipeline creation, dashboards, forecasting support, and CRM process design.

business_development_director.title: Business Development Director
business_development_director.summary: Business development leader with deep industrial and enterprise account experience, focused on strategic outbound, account growth, and pipeline expansion.
selected_wins: Built more than $6M in outbound pipeline through targeted prospecting and outbound systems design.
Generated 3,700+ new accounts through territory planning, targeted outreach, and commercial execution.
Acquired 1,000+ new customers across industrial, healthcare, and B2B markets.
Contributed to a 20 percent sales increase through cross-sell, training, and account development initiatives.
resume_angle: Lead with industrial credibility, complex sales-cycle experience, and alignment with operations and engineering teams.
Emphasize pipeline visibility, quoting alignment, and account development in technical markets.

gtm_systems_ai_growth.title: GTM Systems / AI-enabled Growth
gtm_systems_ai_growth.summary: GTM systems builder who combines AI-assisted research, targeting, CRM process design, and multi-channel outreach to accelerate commercial execution.
selected_wins: Built more than $6M in outbound pipeline through targeted prospecting and outbound systems design.
Generated 3,700+ new accounts through territory planning, targeted outreach, and commercial execution.
Acquired 1,000+ new customers across industrial, healthcare, and B2B markets.
resume_angle: Position around AI-assisted research, targeting, and pipeline acceleration rather than generic software selling.
Connect modern tooling to practical execution gains for commercial teams.
